'''tanguju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xoxo|xoxo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xoxo|xoxo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tanguju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tængijith|tængijith]] || [[word:tængijij|tængijij]] || [[word:tængijish|tængijish]] || [[word:tængiji|tængiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tangungujuth|tangungujuth]] || [[word:tangungujuj|tangungujuj]] || [[word:tangungujush|tangungujush]] || [[word:tangunguju|tangunguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tangujuth|tangujuth]] || [[word:tangujuj|tangujuj]] || [[word:tangujush|tangujush]] || [[word:tanguju|tanguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tangufjuth|tangufjuth]] || [[word:tangufjuj|tangufjuj]] || [[word:tangufjush|tangufjush]] || [[word:tangufjuf|tangufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tangujuthu|tangujuthu]] || [[word:tangujuju|tangujuju]] || [[word:tangujushu|tangujushu]] || [[word:tangujuku|tangujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tangujuth|tangujuth]] || [[word:tangujuj|tangujuj]] || [[word:tangujush|tangujush]] || [[word:tanguju|tanguju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tangujuthul|tangujuthul]] || [[word:tangujujul|tangujujul]] || [[word:tangujushul|tangujushul]] || [[word:tangujukul|tangujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tangujuthuthu|tangujuthuthu]] || [[word:tangujujuju|tangujujuju]] || [[word:tangujushushu|tangujushushu]] || [[word:tangujuku|tangujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tangujuthun|tangujuthun]] || [[word:tangujujun|tangujujun]] || [[word:tangujushun|tangujushun]] || [[word:tangujukun|tangujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tangujuthuoro|tangujuthuoro]] || [[word:tangujujuoro|tangujujuoro]] || [[word:tangujushuoro|tangujushuoro]] || [[word:tangujukuoro|tangujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
